headline: This 2009 Playbook Predicts S&P 500 Is Headed To 3,800
summary: The trading action in the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) since the March lows has been surprising to many investors. According to DataTrek Research co-founder Nicholas Colas, the stock market has performed mostly in-line with expectations based on his 2009 playbook.

headline: Drone Video Shows Progress On Tesla's Gigafactory Texas
summary:
Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) is busy building multiple factories while its stock price soars.

While Gigafactory Berlin is being built in Germany, Tesla has also started construction on the company's second U.S. car manufacturing plant, Gigafactory Texas.

headline: 3 Fabulous Fintech ETFs
summary: As is the case with so many industries, the coronavirus pandemic is spurring increased adoption of fintech offerings.
